meanings.definition: to cause someone to lose clear vision, especially from intense light
examples: She was dazzled by the bright headlights

meanings.definition: amaze or bewilder, as with brilliant wit or intellect or skill
examples: The dancer dazzled the audience with his turns and jumps

meanings.definition: amazingly impressive; suggestive of the flashing of lightning; ; - Janet Flanner; - Idwal Jones
examples: these great best canvases still look as astonishing and as invitingly new as they did...when...his fulgurant popularity was in full growth
adventures related...in a style both vivid and fulgurous
